🌳

Tree Exporter

browser-use compatible
CDP

Capture, merge, and serialize DOM trees for LLM consumption using browser-use's three-tree architecture.

📋

Captured Data

🏗️ DOM
📐 Bounds
♿ A11y
🎨 CSS
👁️ Visibility
🖱️ Interactive

🔄 LLM Serialization Pipeline

Filter → Paint Order → Optimize → BBox Clip → Serialize
